message:
test(cost_model): add 39 edge-case tests for evaluate, second_moment, extreme params, Debug (bd-f4nvu)

- CacheCostParams::evaluate(): components sum to total, matches individual calls, at optimal
- Cache extreme params: negative budget, huge budget, c_mem=0, alpha=0, item_bytes=0
- Cache optimize: comparison_points count, items_cached positive, cost components
- StageStats::second_moment(): deterministic (zero var), with variance
- Pipeline: multi-stage variance, stage breakdown names, unstable headroom, JSONL fields
- BatchCostParams::evaluate(): components sum, single-patch, zero-patches
- Batch total_cost: zero batch_size, larger-than-n, immediate (k=1)
- Batch: single-patch optimal, comparison_points, single/immediate cost consistency
- JSONL: cache/pipeline/batch event field validation
- Debug formatting: CacheCostPoint, BatchCostPoint, StageBreakdown, params
- Sensitivity: min steps is 2, finite values
- Clone trait verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
